scripts.generate: rm -rf dist/client && openapi-generator-cli generate -i ./dist/openapi.yaml -g typescript-fetch -o ./dist/client --git-user-id=polito --git-repo-id=api-spec --additional-properties=npmName=@polito/api-client,npmRepository=https://npm.pkg.github.com/,supportsES6=true,modelPropertyNaming=original,removeOperationIdPrefix=true && cp dist/openapi.yaml dist/client/openapi.yaml && cd dist/client
scripts.build: npm run compile && npm run generate
scripts.copy-local: rm -rf ../students-app/node_modules/@polito/api-client/* && rsync -av ./dist/client/ ../students-app/node_modules/@polito/api-client/ && cd ../students-app/node_modules/@polito/api-client && npm run build
